name: IBM-Aberdeen: Storage Change Brings Opportunities (Sales Team Workshop)
description: Aberdeen Group sales team workshop deck prepared for IBM on Storage Pools and Information Lifecycle Management (ILM). Introduces Aberdeen's DSET C-level framework (Drivers, Strategies, Enablers, Technology) and demonstrates how research agenda sponsorship, value assessment tools, and installed base assessments accelerate IBM storage sales through Aberdeen's ~150,000 registered user research community. Flag: Aberdeen-Confidential / internal IBM enablement.

creator.name: Aberdeen Group (Peter S. Kastner et al.)
